metadata.source: BC Data Catalogue — BC Ministry of Environment (BC OpenMaps WFS)
metadata.description: All BC snow survey stations: ASWS (automated, daily SWE) and MSS (manual snow courses, periodic). Only ASWS stations appear in all_daily_snow_stations.geojson.

properties.name: Sierra Climate

data_variables.name: swe_mm
data_variables.description: ASWS: automated snow pillow reading. Daily file uses 16:00 UTC as canonical value. MSS: manually surveyed water equivalent.

data_variables.name: snwd_cm
data_variables.description: ASWS: automated snow depth sensor reading from SD.csv; 16:00 UTC value used as daily canonical reading. MSS: manually measured snow depth from snow course surveys.

data_variables.name: air_temp_degc
data_variables.description: Hourly air temperature from ASWS stations. 16:00 UTC reading used as daily canonical value.

data_variables.name: precip_cumul_mm
data_variables.description: Cumulative precipitation accumulation from ASWS stations. 16:00 UTC reading used as daily canonical value.

data_variables.name: baro_press_hpa
data_variables.description: Station-level barometric pressure. 16:00 UTC reading used as daily canonical value.

data_variables.name: wind_dir_deg
data_variables.description: Wind direction in degrees from north (0–360). 16:00 UTC reading used as daily canonical value.

data_variables.name: wind_spd_kmh
data_variables.description: Average wind speed. 16:00 UTC reading used as daily canonical value.

data_variables.name: wind_spd_peak_kmh
data_variables.description: Peak (gust) wind speed. 16:00 UTC reading used as daily canonical value.

data_variables.name: wind_run_km
data_variables.description: Cumulative wind run (distance travelled by wind). 16:00 UTC reading used as daily canonical value.

data_variables.name: rh_pct
data_variables.description: Relative humidity as a percentage. 16:00 UTC reading used as daily canonical value.

properties.variables_daily: swe_mm, snwd_cm, air_temp_degc, precip_cumul_mm, baro_press_hpa, wind_dir_deg, wind_spd_kmh, wind_spd_peak_kmh, wind_run_km, rh_pct
